segments.text: PART 1

WOMAN: I've been meaning to ask you for some advice about restaurants – I need to book somewhere to celebrate my sister's 30th birthday and I liked the sound of that place you went to for your mum's 50th.
segments.translation: 女人：我一直想问你一些关于餐厅的建议 —— 我需要预订一个地方庆祝我妹妹的 30 岁生日，我喜欢你为你妈妈庆祝 50 岁生日时去的那家餐厅的声音。

segments.text: MAN: The Junction? Yeah, I'd definitely recommend that for a special occasion.
segments.translation: 男人：枢纽站？是的，如果是特殊场合，我肯定会推荐那里。

segments.text: We had a great time there. Everyone really enjoyed it.
segments.translation: 我们在那里度过了一段美好的时光。每个人都真的很享受。

segments.text: WOMAN: Where is it again? I can't remember.
segments.translation: 女人：在哪儿来着？我记不清了。

segments.text: MAN: It's on Greyson Street, only about a two minute walk from the station.
segments.translation: 男人：在格雷森街，从车站走过去大约两分钟。

segments.text: WOMAN: Oh, that's good. I'd prefer not to have to drive anywhere.
segments.translation: 女人：哦，那太好了。我可不想开车去任何地方。

segments.text: But I don't want to have to walk too far either.
segments.translation: 但我也不想走太远。

segments.text: MAN: Yes, the location's perfect but that's not necessarily why I'd recommend it.
segments.translation: 男人：是的，地理位置很完美，但这不一定是我推荐它的原因。

segments.text: The food's amazing. If you like fish it's probably the best restaurant in town for that.
segments.translation: 食物棒极了。如果你喜欢吃鱼，这里可能是城里最好的餐厅。

segments.text: It's always really fresh and there are lots of interesting dishes to choose from.
segments.translation: 它总是非常新鲜，而且有很多有趣的菜可以选择。

segments.text: But all the food is good there.
segments.translation: 但那里的食物都很好。

segments.text: WOMAN: Is it really expensive?
segments.translation: 女人：真的很贵吗？

segments.text: MAN: It's certainly not cheap but for a special occasion I think it's fine.
segments.translation: 男人：当然不便宜，但对于特殊场合来说，我觉得还不错。

segments.text: It's got a great atmosphere and before dinner you can go up on the roof and have a drink – it's really nice up there but you need to book.
segments.translation: 那里氛围很棒，晚餐前你可以上屋顶喝一杯 —— 那里真的很棒，但你需要预订。

segments.text: It's very popular as the views are spectacular.
segments.translation: 它非常受欢迎，因为景色壮观。

segments.text: WOMAN: Sounds good. So that's definitely a possibility then.
segments.translation: 女人：听起来不错。那么，这确实是一种可能性。

segments.text: Is there anywhere else you can think of?
segments.translation: 你还能想到别的地方吗？

segments.text: MAN: If you want somewhere a bit less formal then you could try Paloma.
segments.translation: 男人：如果你想找个不那么正式的地方，可以试试帕洛玛。

segments.text: WOMAN: Where's that? I haven't heard of it.
segments.translation: 女人：在哪儿？我没听说过。

segments.text: MAN: No, it's quite new. It's only been open a few months but it's got a great reputation already.
segments.translation: 男人：不，那是一家很新的电影院。虽然才开业几个月，但已经享有盛誉了。

segments.text: It's in a really beautiful old building on Bow Street.
segments.translation: 它在弓街上一栋非常漂亮的老建筑里。

segments.text: WOMAN: Oh, I think I know where you mean – right beside the cinema?
segments.translation: 女人：哦，我想我知道你说的是哪里 —— 就在电影院旁边吗？

segments.text: MAN: Yes, that's it. I've only been there a couple of times but I was really impressed.
segments.translation: 男人：是的，就是这样。我只去过那里几次，但我真的印象深刻。

segments.text: The chef used to work at Don Felipe's, apparently.
segments.translation: 显然，那个厨师以前在费利佩先生那里工作过。

segments.text: I was really sorry when that closed down.
segments.translation: 那家店关门的时候我真的很难过。

segments.text: WOMAN: So is all the food they serve Spanish, then?
segments.translation: 女人：那么，他们提供的所有食物都是西班牙语的吗？

segments.text: MAN: Yeah. You can get lots of small dishes to share – which always works really well if you're in a group.
segments.translation: 男人：是啊。你可以分享很多小菜 —— 当你们在一起时，这种方式总是非常有效。

segments.text: WOMAN: Mmm. Worth thinking about.
segments.translation: 女人：嗯，值得考虑。

segments.text: MAN: Yeah. There's a lively atmosphere and the waiters are really friendly.
segments.translation: 男人：是的。那里气氛很活跃，服务员也非常友好。

segments.text: The only thing is that you need to pay a £50 deposit to book a table.
segments.translation: 唯一的问题是，你需要支付 50 英镑的订金才能预订一张桌子。

segments.text: WOMAN: A lot of restaurants are doing that these days.
segments.translation: 女人：现在很多餐厅都在这么做。

segments.text: I should have a look at the menu to check there's a good choice of vegetarian dishes.
segments.translation: 我应该看看菜单，看看有没有不错的素食菜肴。

segments.text: A couple of my friends have stopped eating meat.
segments.translation: 我有几个朋友已经不吃肉了。

segments.text: MAN: Not sure. I'd say the selection of those would be quite limited.
segments.translation: 男人：不确定。我觉得那些菜的选择会相当有限。

segments.text: MAN: I've just thought of another idea.
segments.translation: 男人：我刚刚想到了另一个主意。

segments.text: Have you been to The Audley?
segments.translation: 你去过奥德利吗？

segments.text: WOMAN: No, don't think I've heard of it. How's it spelt?
segments.translation: 女人：不，我想我没听说过。它是怎么拼写的？

segments.text: MAN: A-U-D-L-E-Y. You must have heard of it – there's been a lot about it in the press.
segments.translation: 男人：A-U-D-L-E-Y。你一定听说过 —— 报纸上有很多关于它的报道。

segments.text: WOMAN: I don't tend to pay much attention to that kind of thing. So where is it exactly?
segments.translation: 女人：我一般不太关注这种事。那么，它到底在哪里？

segments.text: MAN: It's in that hotel near Baxter Bridge – on the top floor.
segments.translation: 男人：在巴克斯特桥附近的那家酒店 —— 顶层。

segments.text: WOMAN: Oh, the views would be incredible from up there.
segments.translation: 女人：哦，从那里看到的景色一定很棒。

segments.text: MAN: Yeah. I'd love to go.
segments.translation: 男人：是的，我很想去。

segments.text: I can't think of the chef's name but she was a judge on that TV cookery show recently.
segments.translation: 我想不起那个厨师的名字了，不过她最近是那个电视烹饪节目的评委。

segments.text: And she's written a couple of cookery books.
segments.translation: 她还写了几本烹饪书。

segments.text: WOMAN: Oh, Angela Frayn.
segments.translation: 女人：哦，安吉拉・弗雷恩。

segments.text: MAN: That's the one. Anyway, it's had excellent reviews from all the newspapers.
segments.translation: 男人：就是那个。不管怎样，所有报纸都给了很好的评价。

segments.text: WOMAN: That would be a memorable place for a celebration.
segments.translation: 女人：那将是一个值得纪念的庆祝场所。

segments.text: MAN: Definitely. Obviously it's worth going there just for the view but the food is supposed to be really special.
segments.translation: 男人：确实如此。显然，仅仅为了欣赏风景而去那里是值得的，但食物应该非常特别。

segments.text: WOMAN: She only likes cooking with local products, doesn't she?
segments.translation: 女人：她只喜欢用本地产品做饭，对吧？

segments.text: MAN: Yes. Everything at the restaurant has to be sourced within a short distance and absolutely nothing flown in from abroad.
segments.translation: 男人：是的。餐厅里的所有食材都必须在短距离内采购，而且绝对不能有从国外空运进来的东西。

segments.text: WOMAN: I imagine it's really expensive though.
segments.translation: 女人：不过我想那一定很贵吧。

segments.text: MAN: Well, you could go for the set lunch.
segments.translation: 男人：好吧，你可以去吃套餐午餐。

segments.text: That's quite reasonable for a top class restaurant: £30 a head.
segments.translation: 对于一家顶级餐厅来说，这个价格相当合理：每人 30 英镑。

segments.text: In the evening I think it'd be more like £50.
segments.translation: 晚上的话，我觉得大概要 50 英镑。

segments.text: WOMAN: At least that, I should think. But I'm sure everyone would enjoy it.
segments.translation: 女人：至少我是这么认为的。但我相信每个人都会喜欢的。

segments.text: It's not the kind of place you leave feeling hungry though, is it? With tiny portions?
segments.translation: 不过，这不是那种会让你饿着肚子离开的地方，对吧？只吃很少的分量？

segments.text: MAN: No, the reviews I've read didn't mention that. I imagine they'd be average.
segments.translation: 男人：不，我读过的评论没有提到这一点。我想它们应该是一般的。

segments.text: WOMAN: Well, that's all great, thanks …
segments.translation: 女人：嗯，那太好了，谢谢......
